updates.message: Order received and is being prepared

integrations.title: Mobile Money and Cash on Delivery
integrations.description: Support MTN Mobile Money, Airtel Money, and cash-on-delivery so customers across Uganda can pay in the way they trust most.
integrations.benefit: Reduces payment friction for customers without credit cards.

integrations.title: Local Pickup and Delivery Network
integrations.description: Offer pickup locations in Kampala, Jinja, and Gulu plus last-mile delivery partnerships with local couriers.
integrations.benefit: Speeds delivery and lowers shipping costs for rural customers.

integrations.title: Vendor Price Sync
integrations.description: Automatically mirror electronics prices from marketplaces like Techno, Samsung, and Hisense wholesale suppliers for better sourcing decisions.
integrations.benefit: Keeps catalog prices competitive and avoids inventory mismatches.

integrations.title: SMS Order Tracking
integrations.description: Send order updates via SMS or WhatsApp to customers so they can follow shipments without mobile data.
integrations.benefit: Improves trust and reduces customer support inquiries.

integrations.title: Mobile Money Integration
integrations.description: Real-time mobile money payments through MTN Mobile Money and Airtel Money with instant confirmation and low transaction fees.
integrations.benefit: Enables digital payments for 80% of Ugandan consumers who prefer mobile money over cards.
